categories.name: Existence & Completeness
evidence: 14 Python code files present; no empty code files or stub-only files found; all modules imported successfully.

categories.name: Static Analysis
evidence: ruff, flake8, pylint, mypy, pyright, radon, vulture, bandit, semgrep, locust, and memory-profiler were not installed in the venv.

categories.name: Integration Tests
evidence: Real HTTP probes to all adapters failed with ClientConnectorError / Access is denied on outbound HTTPS.

categories.name: Data Quality & Accuracy
evidence: No real checkpoint or ground-truth model pipeline exists in this folder scope; real-data criteria could not be completed.

categories.name: Performance & Load
evidence: Synthetic dedup benchmark: 10k save in 0.0172s and 10k lookups at 0.000379 ms each.
Synthetic concurrent ingestion: 10 cycles completed in 5.3971s with 1000 new samples and 5000 duplicates.

categories.name: Stability & Resilience
evidence: Malformed input probe passed across empty, HTML, Unicode, binary-like, traversal-like, and 100K-token samples.
Synthetic concurrent write test passed with 10 parallel ingestion cycles.

categories.name: Scalability
evidence: Dedup store handled 10k entries with fast lookup and save in the local temp harness.
Parallel synthetic ingestion remained stable under 10 concurrent cycles.

categories.name: Governance & Security
evidence: can_ai_use_network(), can_ai_execute(), and can_ai_verify_bug() all returned False.
No real secrets scan was run because trufflehog and gitleaks were not installed.

blockers: Outward HTTPS access denied for all six live adapters.
No folder-local tests exist to run.
Static-analysis and load-test tools missing from the venv.
